ios.info.plist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: IITC Prime can show your current position on the Ingress Intel map. Location access is optional.
ios.info.plist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lets you take a photo when a map page asks to import a file
ios.info.plist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Lets you record a video when a map page asks to import a file
ios.info.plist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lets you attach a photo from your library when a map page asks to import a file
